name: Golf Island - Coeur d' Alene
address: 2480 N Old Mill Loop, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83814
about: Golf Island - Coeur d' Alene is a virtual golf facility in North Idaho, powered by TrackMan technology for accurate ball and club tracking. The venue features the largest bays in the industry, each equipped with two 55-inch TVs, and accommodates up to six players per bay. It operates as a sports bar and event space, offering food and drink, league play, tournaments, and private party bookings.
why_golfers_like_it: Oversized bays allow for unrestricted swings without feeling cramped
TrackMan technology provides highly accurate data for practice and play
Large food and drink menu available for group events and casual play
Versatile space suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Large food and drink menu available for in-venue consumption
Bar seating available; mix and match any 6 drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clubs for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full food and drink menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies based on group size and pace, but typically ranges from 1-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility accommodates families and offers an environment suitable for children.
